content: AI won't replace your support team. But a founder who thinks it will? That's the real risk.
We hired 12 people last quarter. Not one had a traditional CS degree. Best quarter in company history.
Raised $5M in 2019. Could have raised $20M. Took the smaller round. That discipline is why we're profitable today.
Your contact center is not a cost center. It's the only department that talks to every single customer.
Hot take: most AI demos I see at conferences would fail in a real contact center in 30 seconds.
